mapper.select:
SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode,
i.status_code AS statusCode,
i.title AS title, i.priority AS priority,
i.assignee_code AS assigneeCode, au.name AS assigneeName,
i.created_by_code AS createdByCode, cu.name AS creatorName,
i.created_at AS createdAt, i.position AS position FROM issues i LEFT JOIN users au ON au.user_code = i.assignee_code LEFT JOIN users cu ON cu.user_code = i.created_by_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} ORDER BY i.status_id, COALESCE(i.position, 999999), i.issue_code DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE issues SET status_code = #{toStatusCode}, position = #{position}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE issue_code = #{issueCode}

update.foreach: UPDATE issues SET position = #{it.position}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE issue_code = #{it.issueCode}

mapper.select:
SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode,
i.status_code AS statusCode, i.title AS title, i.priority AS priority,
i.assignee_code AS assigneeCode, au.name AS assigneeName,
i.created_by_code AS createdByCode, cu.name AS creatorName,
i.created_at AS createdAt, i.position AS position,
p.project_name AS projectName FROM issues i LEFT JOIN users au ON au.user_code = i.assignee_code LEFT JOIN users cu ON cu.user_code = i.created_by_code LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code WHERE ( i.assignee_code = #{loginUserCode} OR i.created_by_code = #{loginUserCode} ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{loginUserCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code ) ORDER BY i.status_code, COALESCE(i.position, 999999), i.issue_code DESC
